Core Industries Served

The Problem

YOUR BUSINESS IS GROWING —BUT YOUR SYSTEMS MAY NOT BE.

Most growing businesses lose time and money because their tools do not talk to each other. Orders are managed in one place, stock is checked somewhere else, leads sit in WhatsApp, staff rely on spreadsheets, and owners cannot see real performance clearly.

🗂️

Manual Admin

Too much time wasted on repetitive tasks, spreadsheets, copy-paste work, and chasing updates.

🔌

Disconnected Systems

CRM, website, stock system, marketplaces, and reporting tools are not properly connected.

📉

Missed Sales

Leads are not followed up quickly, stock is not pushed to enough channels, and marketplaces are underused.

👁️

Poor Visibility

Owners cannot easily see live sales, profit, stock movement, customer activity, and operational performance.

What We Do

OUR SERVICES.

CRM

CRM & Automation

Capture leads, automate follow-ups, manage pipelines, send WhatsApp/SMS/email reminders, and book appointments automatically.

Learn More
AI

AI Agents & Assistants

Deploy AI assistants that qualify leads, answer customer questions, support staff, prepare summaries, and trigger workflows automatically.

Learn More
E-COMMERCE

E-commerce Operations

Manage and grow sales across TikTok Shop, eBay, Amazon, WooCommerce, and Shopify with listings, stock sync, and dispatch workflows.

Learn More
DEVELOPMENT

Custom Software Development

Bespoke B2B portals, inventory systems, and mobile apps built around your exact operational workflow.

Learn More
WHOLESALE

Wholesale & B2B Systems

Trade ordering portals, live stock catalogues, customer pricing tiers, sales rep tools, and purchase order workflows.

Learn More
DROPSHIPPING

Dropshipping Inventory Network

Connect wholesale inventory with approved online sellers — wholesalers keep control while dropshippers list products across more channels.

Learn More

AI Automation

AI AGENTS THAT WORK WITHYOUR BUSINESS SYSTEMS.

We help businesses deploy AI agents connected to real workflows — not just simple chat widgets. AI assistants that qualify leads, answer customer questions, support staff, and hand over to your team when needed.

🤖

AI Lead Assistant

Qualifies enquiries, asks the right questions, and sends clean lead data into your CRM.

💬

AI Customer Support

Answers common questions, supports customers, and escalates complex issues to your team.

📊

AI Business Assistant

Summarises tasks, reminders, sales updates, and key business activity for owners and managers.

🛒

AI E-commerce Assistant

Helps with product content, customer replies, return responses, and marketplace workflows.

Deploy an AI Assistant

New Service

DROPSHIPPING &WHOLESALE INVENTORY.

Turn your wholesale stock into a connected sales network. Mivan Global Ltd is developing a dropshipping inventory system that helps wholesalers connect their live stock with approved online sellers, resellers, and marketplace operators.

📡

Live Stock API

Share selected inventory with approved sellers using live stock updates.

🔐

Approved Reseller Access

Control who can access your products, pricing, and catalogue.

📦

Marketplace-Ready Data

Provide titles, images, descriptions, barcodes, and stock information.

🔄

Automated Order Flow

Dropshipper orders flow back to the wholesaler for fulfilment.

Explore DropshippingDiscuss Integration
Inventory Network
Wholesalers + Dropshippers Connected

Why Choose Us

WHY BUSINESSESCHOOSE MIVAN GLOBAL.

⚙️

Real Business Operations Experience

We understand stock, orders, dispatch, sales, marketplaces, customer service, and reporting — not just websites.

🔗

Systems That Connect

We connect CRM, e-commerce, inventory, accounting, customer support, and reporting tools so your team works from cleaner data.

⏱️

Automation That Saves Time

We reduce repetitive admin with automated follow-ups, order flows, stock sync, reminders, notifications, and dashboards.

🛠️

Built Around Your Workflow

We map your process first, then build the right system around it — not force you into a generic template.

🏪

Marketplace & Wholesale Knowledge

We understand TikTok Shop, eBay, Amazon, WooCommerce, wholesale stock, B2B pricing, and dispatch performance.

🇬🇧

UK-Based Support

Mivan Global Ltd is a UK company supporting UK businesses with practical digital solutions.
